dag_desc: Replace terminal intent gate with computed/detected/prompt audit — agents answer only gaps, not forms

tasks.desc: Assemble commit-status, test-evidence, audit-trail from completed.json receipts at advance time. Terminal advance reads completion records and builds these sections mechanically — no agent input. Output: computedReport object on the advance result.

Mechanically detect: (1) uncovered consumes[] edges — consume not validated by any shell/artifact-exists, (2) scope leaks — changed files outside any produces[], (3) untested produces — produce files not referenced by any shell test command. Returns detected gaps as structured array.

New validator type 'terminal-audit'. Runs computed sections + gap detection, generates prompts only for detected gaps, validates agent responses address each detected item. Replaces both the propagated artifact-exists/shell validators and the intent gate on terminal nodes. fail_if: detected items not addressed in prompt answers.

Two-phase advance for terminal nodes. Phase 1: advance without --evaluate-file runs mechanical validators + gap detection, returns context packet (computed sections + detected gaps + specific prompts). Phase 2: advance with --evaluate-file containing responses to detected gaps only. If no gaps detected, auto-passes — no file needed. Eliminate generic prompt questions.

Update tasksToDAG to inject terminal-audit validator instead of propagated artifact-exists + shell + intent gate. Remove the old 3-step injection (artifact propagation, shell propagation, intent gate). Single terminal-audit validator replaces all three.

Full E2E: create DAG via roadmap make, verify terminal node has terminal-audit validator, advance all nodes, advance term without --evaluate-file (get context packet with gaps), advance term with responses (auto-pass if no gaps). Verify computed sections are correct, detected gaps match reality.

validate.command: npx vitest run tests/cli-intake-enforcement.test.ts tests/make-input-verification.test.ts tests/gitsafe-multirepo.test.ts
